mentions.note: Part of 'Big Five Travel' theme; terrific trades ahead of earnings.
Reports Friday; almost always good quarter, stock almost always hit (pattern observed). Stupid selling — perfect buying opportunity.
Down from 387, long knives out; contrarian buy here; scale in at 290, add again at 280; great company.
Unchanged on Day 2 despite -18% YTD; Cramer expected more strength.
Thursday earnings; typically retreats on numbers then runs days later; wait until end of day or next morning to buy on knee-jerk selling; numbers usually solid.
Stock down 9% despite being rarely down for the year. Precisely the level to put on 50% position now, then add if dips further next week. Steve Squeri doing dynamite job.
